creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

"Doesn't work" isn't a problem description that anyone can really 
work with for such a complex beast as Apache.  "Try to set up" 
isn't a feasible How-To-Repeat either, again because of the  
complexity and number of variables within the scenario. 

Please either ask for help on the <freebsd-questions> mailing  
list (if you're not 100% sure that this is a bug in FreeBSD) 
or refile a new PR that provides enough information for the 
Apache port maintainer to work with.  Such information might 
include the output of ifconfig -a, nslookup output for 
each IP address identified, and your Apache config files.
